name_zh: GLP-1受体激动剂在肥胖人群中的心血管、肾脏和安全性结局
name_en: GLP-1 receptor agonists in obesity: cardiovascular, renal, and safety outcomes
description_zh: 追踪司美格鲁肽、替尔泊肽、利拉鲁肽、度拉糖肽等药物在肥胖或超重人群中的心血管、肾脏、死亡和安全性证据。
pubmed_query: (("Glucagon-Like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists"[Mesh] OR semaglutide[Title/Abstract] OR tirzepatide[Title/Abstract] OR liraglutide[Title/Abstract] OR dulaglutide[Title/Abstract] OR retatrutide[Title/Abstract]) AND ("Obesity"[Mesh] OR obes*[Title/Abstract] OR overweight[Title/Abstract]) AND (cardiovascular[Title/Abstract] OR renal[Title/Abstract] OR kidney[Title/Abstract] OR mortality[Title/Abstract] OR safety[Title/Abstract] OR adverse[Title/Abstract] OR guideline[Publication Type] OR randomized controlled trial[Publication Type] OR meta-analysis[Publication Type] OR systematic review[Publication Type]))
europe_pmc_query: (semaglutide OR tirzepatide OR liraglutide OR dulaglutide OR retatrutide) AND (obesity OR overweight) AND (cardiovascular OR renal OR kidney OR mortality OR safety OR adverse)
clinical_trials_query: (AREA[ConditionSearch](Obesity) OR AREA[ConditionSearch](Overweight)) AND (AREA[InterventionSearch](Semaglutide) OR AREA[InterventionSearch](Tirzepatide) OR AREA[InterventionSearch](Liraglutide) OR AREA[InterventionSearch](Dulaglutide) OR AREA[InterventionSearch](Retatrutide))
